display.purpose: Page titles only; fixed product scale, no fluid hero sizing.

body.purpose: Japanese and English operational copy with generous line height.

label.purpose: Field labels and compact metadata labels.

shadows.name: floating-layer
shadows.purpose: Reserved for future popovers or menus.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Short hover, focus, disclosure, and loading state transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Disable nonessential movement and preserve instant state changes.

rules: Operational Blue is an action and state color, not decoration.
Japanese and English copy must be structurally equivalent.
Use borders and tonal surfaces before shadows.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The decisive action on a screen or form group.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; background: #1769AA; color: #FFFFFF; font: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: #12598F; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #9AD0F3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text entry for link IDs, room IDs, TTL values, labels, and search.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #343A42; font: 500 0.875rem/1.45 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; border: 1px solid #C5CED6; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #17191C; font: 400 1rem/1.7 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #9AD0F3; outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #1769AA; }

components.name: Task Panel
components.description: A bordered work surface for issuing, results, link rows, and archive detail.
components.html:
Issue link

Set a room and expiry before issuing.
components.css: .ds-panel { display: grid; gap: 16px; padding: 18px; border: 1px solid #D9E0E5; border-radius: 8px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #17191C; box-shadow: none; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0; font: 700 1rem/1.45 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: #66717D; line-height: 1.7; }
